definition:
1. to make soft, mild  or gentle, to soften, soothe, calm , (Hesiod), etc.; πρ. ἕλκος to soothe  a raging sore, (Sophocles Tragicus); πρ. τινὰ λόγοις (Aeschulus Tragicus):—;Pass. to become soft  or gentle, grow milder , (Herdotus Historicus); of passion, to abate , (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. to tame  wild animals, (Hesiod) (ML)
